name: Shrimps in Chipotle Sauce- Camarones Enchipotlados
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Large shrimps, peeled and butterflied with tail (Shells left on)
4 Chilies chipotles adobados, or to taste
1 Garlic clove, peeled and roughly chopped
1/4 tsp Dried oregano, Mexican if possible
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the shrimps with salt, pepper, and lime juice and set aside to marinate for about 30 minutes.
2. Heat the oil in a frying pan; add the drained shrimp, reserving any liquid, and sliced onion and fry, shaking the pan and tossing the ingredients, for about 3 minutes.
3. Remove shrimp and onion with a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. In a blender, blend the tomatoes, chipotles and their liquid, and garlic to a textured sauce.
5. Reheat the oil, add the sauce, and fry over high heat, stirring and scraping the bottom of the pan to prevent sticking, for about 8 minutes.
6. Add the wine, oregano, marinade, and salt to taste and cook for another minute.
7. Add the shrimp/onion mixture and cook for about 2 minutes - the shrimps should be just cooked and still crisp.
